Please enter the text to synthesize.
Keep as Auto to auto-detect the language: Keep as Auto to auto-detect the language.
1.0 = normal. >1 faster, <1 slower. Igno: 1.0 = normal. >1 faster, <1 slower. Ignored if Duration is set.
Leave empty to use speed. Set a fixed du: Leave empty to use speed. Set a fixed duration to override speed.
Default: 32. Lower = faster, higher = be: Default: 32. Lower = faster, higher = better quality.
Default: enabled. Uncheck to disable den: Default: enabled. Uncheck to disable denoising.
apply silence removal and trimming to th: apply silence removal and trimming to the reference audio, add punctuation in the end of reference text (if not already)
Remove long silences from generated audi: Remove long silences from generated audio.
Enter the text you want to synthesize...
Transcript of the reference audio. Leave: Transcript of the reference audio. Leave empty to auto-transcribe via ASR models.
MD_DEMO_HEADER:
# OmniVoice Demo

State-of-the-art text-to-speech model for **600+ languages**, supporting:

- **Voice Clone** — Clone any voice from a reference audio
- **Voice Design** — Create custom voices with speaker attributes

Built with [OmniVoice](https://github.com/k2-fsa/OmniVoice)
by Xiaomi Next-gen Kaldi team.
Model checkpoint path or HuggingFace rep: Model checkpoint path or HuggingFace repo id.
Reference audio file path for voice clon: Reference audio file path for voice cloning.
Reference text describing the reference: Reference text describing the reference audio.
Style instruction for voice design mode.
Fixed output duration in seconds. If set: Fixed output duration in seconds. If set, overrides the model's duration estimation. The speed factor is automatically adjusted to match while preserving language-aware pacing.
Device to use for inference. Auto-detect: Device to use for inference. Auto-detected if not specified.
Path to the model checkpoint (local dir: Path to the model checkpoint (local dir or HF repo id). Audio tokenizer is expected at <checkpoint>/audio_tokenizer/.
Path to the JSONL file containing test s: Path to the JSONL file containing test samples. Each line is a JSON object: {"id": "name", "text": "...", "ref_audio": "/path.wav", "ref_text": "...", "language_id": "en", "language_name": "English", "duration": 10.0, "speed": 1.2}. language_id, language_name, duration, and speed are optional.
Language id to use when test_list JSONL: Language id to use when test_list JSONL entries do not contain language_id/language_name fields. If provided, both language_id and language_name will be set to this value.
No GPU found. Falling back to CPU infere: No GPU found. Falling back to CPU inference. This might be slow.
No speech was generated. RTF cannot be c: No speech was generated. RTF cannot be computed.
Skip loading Whisper ASR model. Referenc: Skip loading Whisper ASR model. Reference text auto-transcription will be unavailable.
